announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Bandhan Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about Amalgamation/Merger

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Bandhan Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about Amalgamation/Merger

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Bandhan Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Newspaper advertisement of the Hon��ble National Company Law Tribunal, Bench at Kolkata (��NCLT��) convened meeting of the equity shareholders of Bandhan Bank Limited'.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Bandhan Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Allotment of equity shares of the Bank to the eligible shareholders of the GRUH Finance Limited ( GRUH ) pursuant to effectiveness of the Scheme of Amalgamation of GRUH Finance Limited into and with the Bank under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013 (including the Companies (Compromises, Arrangements and Amalgamations) Rules, 2016) and other relevant provisions under applicable law ( Scheme )'.

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Bandhan Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about  Receipt of order dated June 20, 2019 from the Hon��ble National Company Law Tribunal, Kolkata bench (��NCLT��) for convening the meetings of the equity shareholders of Bandhan Bank Limited

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Bandhan Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Newspaper advertisement intimating about date of final hearing of petition for sanction of the Scheme of Amalgamation'.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Bandhan Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Newspaper advertisement of the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Bench at Kolkata ('NCLT') convened meeting of the equity shareholders of Bandhan Bank Limited ('Transferee Company' or 'Bank')  '.

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Bandhan Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Receipt of approval of the Competition Commission of India to the proposed scheme of amalgamation of GRUH Finance Limited into and with Bandhan Bank Limited under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013 and other relevant provisions under applicable law

announcements.headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.body: Bandhan Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding  Board meeting held on January 07, 2019, has approved a scheme of Amalgamation of GRUH Finance Limited with Bandhan Bank Limited.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Bandhan Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Scheme of Amalgamation of Gruh Finance Limited into and with Bandhan bank Limited ("Bank") under Section 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013 (including the Companies (Compromises, Arrangements and Amalgamation ) Rules 2016) and other relevant Provisions under applicable law ( "Scheme").

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 - Filing of the Company Application in relation to the scheme of amalgamation of GRUH Finance Limited into and with Bandhan Bank Limited under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013 and other relevant provisions under applicable law

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Bandhan Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015  Receipt of SEBI approval for adoption of the proposed scheme of amalgamation of GRUH Finance Limited into and with Bandhan Bank Limited under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013 and other relevant provisions under applicable law as a method to comply with Minimum Public Shareholding (��MPS��) norms'.
